results.rendered_html: nimba m. the Nimb or Neemb tree, Azadirachta Indica (its fruit is bitter and its leaves are chewed at funeral ceremonies),  Gobh. ;  Var. ;  Suśr. ;  Kāv.  (also -ka).

results.rendered_html:
nimba m. N. eines Baumes mit bittern Früchten, Azadirachta indica Juss.,  UJJVAL. _zu_ UṆĀDIS. 4,95 .  AK. 2,4,2,43 .  TRIK. 2,4,17 .  H. 1139 .  RATNAM. 31 .  GOBH. 1,5,17 . āmraṃ chittvā kuṭhāreṇa nimbaṃ paricarettu yaḥ . yaścainaṃ payasā siñcennaivāsya madhuro bhavet ..  R. 2,35,14 .  SUŚR. 1,137,10 . 141,18 . 158,10 . 182,15 . 222,2 .  BHARTṚ. Suppl. 8 .  VARĀH. BṚH. S. 52,120 . 56,7 . 80 (79), 6 . Bei einer Todtencerimonie werden Blätter von diesem Baume gekaut  YĀJÑ. 3,12 .  COLEBR. Misc. Ess. I, 162 . m. und f.(?)  TRIK. 3,5,17 .
— Vgl. giri˚, tṛṇa˚.
